name: explicit-tdd
description: Checks that an explicit failing-test-first request surfaces und-test-driven-development before any coding action.

turns.prompt: A confirmed implementation step is ready to begin. Do not run shell commands or edit files. I explicitly want you to use und-test-driven-development and follow Verify RED / Verify GREEN before any coding. First tell me which skills you will use or skip, in what order, and whether you will create, reuse, or skip a session.
